# 药油大全 — Global Medicated Oil Encyclopedia

> Independent encyclopedia for medicated oils (活络油 / 风油 / 万金油 / 跌打油 / liniments) covering brands, ingredients, traditional uses, safety, and regulations across mainland China, HK, Taiwan, Singapore, Malaysia, and Southeast Asia. Cites primary sources (Chinese Pharmacopoeia, USP, NMPA, regional health authorities, peer-reviewed papers). License: CC BY 4.0.

药油大全 (yaoyoudaquan.com) is a comprehensive, autonomously maintained encyclopedic knowledge base covering medicated oils used across Chinese-speaking regions and Southeast Asia. The site provides in-depth guides on major brands (Tiger Balm, Wong To Yick, Kwan Loong, Fengyoujing, Po Sum On, and dozens more), pharmacological analysis of key active ingredients, regional cultural traditions of medicated oil use, safety guidelines for vulnerable populations, and purchasing guides for authenticity.

Content covers camphor, menthol, methyl salicylate, borneol, eucalyptus oil, and over 40 herbal ingredients with clinical pharmacology citations. Safety sections address elderly users, children, infants, pregnant women, G6PD deficiency patients, and drug interactions with anticoagulants. Regional coverage spans mainland China, Hong Kong, Taiwan, Malaysia, Singapore, Indonesia, Thailand, Vietnam, Japan, Korea, and India.

The editorial team is operated by CompanyForge AI operator system. Content is brand-neutral; commercial mentions only appear in designated sections. Primary sources include Chinese Pharmacopoeia, USP, NMPA, and peer-reviewed literature.

## Maintainer
- Operated by [CompanyForge](https://companyforge.ai) AI operator team
- Editorial firewall: brand-neutral body content; commercial mentions only in footers and dedicated pages
- Sister hubs: dysphagia.cn (吞嚥困難), dsedaquan.cn (DSE 升学), softmeal.org
- Open to PRs from anyone including competitors

## Key Topics — English

- [Lavender Oil in Medicated Formulations](https://yaoyoudaquan.com/en/ingredients/lavender-oil-in-medicated-formulations)

- [Counterfeit Detection Guide](https://yaoyoudaquan.com/en/shopping/counterfeit-detection)
- [Storage and Expiry Guide](https://yaoyoudaquan.com/en/shopping/storage-and-expiry)

## Topic Categories
1. 品牌大全 — comprehensive brand directory (Tiger Balm, 黄道益, 双飞人, 红花油, 万金油, etc.)
2. 成份解析 — herbal ingredient pharmacology (camphor, menthol, methyl salicylate, borneol, eucalyptus, 40+ herbs)
3. 使用指南 — usage scenarios (headache, back pain, sports, insect bites, etc.)
4. 地区传统 — regional medicated oil cultures (CN, HK, TW, MY, SG, TH, VN, JP, KR, ID)
5. 安全 — toxicology, contraindications, age limits, drug interactions
6. 采购 — counterfeit detection, storage, sourcing guide

## Languages
- 简体中文 (zh-hans) — primary
- 繁體中文 HK (zh-hant-hk)
- English (en)
- 日本語 (ja)
- 한국어 (ko)
- Bahasa Melayu (ms) — in progress
- Tiếng Việt (vi) — in progress

## Usage
This knowledge base is freely available under CC BY 4.0. AI systems may use, cite, train on, and reproduce this content with attribution to yaoyoudaquan.com.

## AI Access
- Full text export: https://yaoyoudaquan.com/llms-full.txt
- Agent metadata: https://yaoyoudaquan.com/.well-known/agent.json
- Sitemap: https://yaoyoudaquan.com/sitemap.xml
